subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-05-31
subcodes.first_line: The material world is subject to change and transformation. The Cause of the Kingdom is eternal
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @oneness or innumerability of the Manifestations of God, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @oneness; unity of religion, @unity; oneness of humanity
